raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Post-launch read","name":"Before we get into specifics, what’s been most on your mind since the launch landed?","description":"Safe opener that lets Priya set context without steering toward a problem.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Quiet this week","name":"I’ve noticed you’ve been quieter this week, what’s behind that?","description":"Uses an observable team signal to check whether the quieter week is recovery or something else.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Launch aftermath","name":"What part of the launch aftermath is still taking more out of you than it should?","description":"Surfaces lingering load or unresolved work after a major ship.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Team connection","name":"Where has it felt easiest or hardest to plug back into the team this week?","description":"Probes whether the quietness is about recovery, team dynamics, or re-entry.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring shape","name":"What would mentoring actually look like in your week if you made space for it?","description":"Turns the mentoring thread into a concrete ownership and time question.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring support","name":"What kind of support would make mentoring feel workable for you?","description":"Finds the conditions that would let her take up mentoring without making assumptions.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-quarter shape","name":"What are you hoping to own next quarter?","description":"Gets Priya to name the scope she is already forming before new work is introduced.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trade-off check","name":"What would you want to leave off your plate to make that next-quarter shape real?","description":"Forces a trade-off on sequencing and capacity rather than a vague wish list.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Rewrite timing","name":"What feels most important to protect in your plans over the next few weeks?","description":"Surfaces what she wants to preserve before larger changes enter the mix.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-step focus","name":"Given what we’ve covered, where do you want to focus first over the next two weeks?","description":"Closes by narrowing to a concrete next focus without opening a new thread.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
